Columns.Name: 解析_自動送信待ち件数

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.analysis_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "解析_解析待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.analysis_pending_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "解析_解析保留件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.office_work_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "解析_業務対応中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.auto_send_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "解析_自動送信待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.analysis_complete_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "解析_完了待ち件数"
   FROM (t_object_analysis main
     JOIN m_analysis_status sub ON ((main.analysis_status_id = sub.analysis_status_id)))
  WHERE ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM t_object_order
          WHERE ((t_object_order.object_order_id = main.object_order_id) AND (t_object_order.active_flg = 1)))) AND ((sub.analysis_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.analysis_pending_flg = 1) OR (sub.office_work_flg = 1) OR (sub.auto_send_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.analysis_complete_wait_flg = 1)));
